name: @elisym/plugin-elizaos-elisym
description: ElizaOS plugin for running a paid elisym provider agent on Nostr + Solana. Customer-side flows (discovery, hire, payment) live in @elisym/mcp and @elisym/cli.
author: elisym labs

scripts.qa: tsup && vitest run && tsc --noEmit && oxlint src/ && oxfmt --check src/

ELISYM_NOSTR_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Hex (64 chars) or nsec-encoded Nostr secret key. If empty, plugin generates and persists one.

ELISYM_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Base58-encoded 64-byte Solana secret key. If empty (and ELISYM_SOLANA_PAYMENT_ADDRESS is also unset), plugin generates one on first start and persists it to agent memory. Mutually exclusive with ELISYM_SOLANA_PAYMENT_ADDRESS.

ELISYM_SOLANA_PAYMENT_ADDRESS.description: Recommended. Public Solana address (base58, 32 bytes) where customer payments are received. Use this to keep the private key out of the plugin process: the agent never signs Solana transactions, so a public address is enough. Mutually exclusive with ELISYM_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.

ELISYM_RELAYS.description: Comma-separated Nostr relay URLs. Omit to use SDK defaults.

ELISYM_SOLANA_RPC_URL.description: Solana RPC endpoint. Omit to use the public cluster for the chosen network.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_CAPABILITIES.description: Comma-separated capabilities to advertise. Required unless ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRODUCTS or ELISYM_PROVIDER_SKILLS_DIR is set.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRICE.description: Price per job, decimal in the token denominated by ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRICE_TOKEN. Required (with ELISYM_PROVIDER_CAPABILITIES) unless ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRODUCTS or ELISYM_PROVIDER_SKILLS_DIR is set.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRICE_TOKEN.description: 'sol' (native SOL) or 'usdc' (SPL USDC on Solana devnet). Pairs with ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRICE.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_ACTION_MAP.description: JSON map { capability: ActionName } for provider routing.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Product/capability display name shown on the NIP-89 card. Defaults to character.name.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_DESCRIPTION.description: Product description shown on the NIP-89 card. Defaults to character.bio. Do NOT put the system prompt here.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRODUCTS.description: JSON array of products: [{name, description, capabilities, price, token}]. token is 'sol' (default) or 'usdc'; price is decimal in that token. Supersedes ELISYM_PROVIDER_CAPABILITIES/PRICE/PRICE_TOKEN/NAME/DESCRIPTION. Cards no longer in the array are deleted from relays on startup.

ELISYM_SIGNER_KIND.description: 'local' (generate/load hot key, default), 'kms' (defer signing to an external KMS adapter; no adapter bundled), or 'external' (bring-your-own Signer).

ELISYM_PROVIDER_SKILLS_DIR.description: Absolute or relative path to a directory of SKILL.md folders. Each skill auto-registers as a provider product with its own capabilities and price. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for the skill LLM tool-use loop.
